NAME: Taizhou Imaging Study
MANUAL_CITATION: Jiang, Y., Cui, M., Tian, W., Zhu, S., Chen, J., Suo, C., ... & Taizhou Imaging Study Group. (2021). Lifestyle, multi‐omics features, and preclinical dementia among Chinese: the Taizhou Imaging Study. Alzheimer's & Dementia, 17(1), 18-28.
DESCRIPTION: Prospective Chinese cohort (Taizhou) combining lifestyle factors with multi-omics and brain imaging to study aging and preclinical dementia.
